This report covers Academic Session 2025â€“26 â€” a 3-month Spoken English & Personality Development program delivered by Education Beyond Borders across 8 schools in partnership with Sopra Steria CSR. All programs ran Sept 2025 â€“ Jan 2026.

Female students consistently outperformed in 7 of 8 schools â€” validating EBB's particular effectiveness in empowering girl-child voice in rural and semi-urban contexts.

"This isn't just a score improvement story. This is a confidence-building, mindset-shifting, life-changing journey."

What this adds up to
One program. Eight schools. Lasting change.
Across every school â€” regardless of starting point, class level, or background â€” three things held true: participation surged, confidence grew, and peer mentoring emerged without prompting.
